rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Western Electric Company, Inc. To Appear And Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, June 21, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. PLAINTIFFS DONALD GAUGER, MARGARET GAUGER, MARGARET GAUGER, CHRISTOPHER GAUGER, CHARLES GAUGER Motion To Compel Western Electric Company, Inc. To Appear And Produce Documents At Deposition. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Western Electric Co., Inc. to appear and produce documents at deposition: plaintiffs and defendant Alcatel Lucent are directed to continue their meet and confer efforts described in plaintiffs¿ reply papers. If all issues have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on June 20 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on June 21. = (220/HEK)

DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX LLC SII TO ABEX CORPORATION MOTION To Compel Plaintiff Larry Kennedy's Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And Request For Sanctions. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion to compel plaintiff Larry Kennedy¿s further responses to requests for admissions and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)
